data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Here's my analysis of **all legacy patterns** found:

| # | Legacy Pattern | Simplification |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="...">` | Replace with `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">` |
| 2 | Manual `<Import>` of `Microsoft.Common.props` / `Microsoft.CSharp.targets` | Implicit in SDK-style |
| 3 | Explicit `<Configuration>` / `<Platform>` conditionals | SDK defaults handle this |
| 4 | `<ProjectGuid>` | Not needed |
| 5 | `<FileAlignment>`, `<Deterministic>`, `<AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>` | Defaults in SDK-style |
| 6 | Separate Debug/Release `<PropertyGroup>` blocks | SDK provides sensible defaults |
| 7 | `<Reference Include="System" />` etc. | Implicit framework references |
| 8 | `<Compile Include="..." />` for every `.cs` file | SDK auto-globs `**/*.cs` |
| 9 | `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | SDK auto-generates; metadata moves to `.csproj` properties |
| 10 | `<TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2` | Becomes `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| 11 | `<RootNamespace>` / `<AssemblyName>` matching filename | Can be omitted (defaults to project name) |
| 12 | `<OutputType>Library</OutputType>` | Library is the default |

Let me apply all of these now.

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

arguments.description: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture. Let me analyze all the legacy patterns and modernize this to SDK-style.

Legacy patterns identified:
1. **Old-style `<Project>` element** with `ToolsVersion` and `xmlns` — replaced by `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Manual `<Import>` of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`** — SDK-style handles this automatically
3. **Explicit `<Configuration>` and `<Platform>` conditionals** — SDK defaults handle these
4. **`<ProjectGuid>`** — not needed in SDK-style


5. **`<FileAlignment>`**, **`<AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>`**, and **`<Deterministic>`** — all defaults in the SDK
6. **Debug/Release property groups** — SDK provides sensible defaults for standard configurations
7. **System assembly references** — implicitly available, no explicit declaration needed
8. **File includes** — SDK uses automatic globbing patterns instead of manual enumeration
9. **`Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`** — auto-generated by the SDK, no longer required

Now I need to handle the remaining legacy elements: converting `TargetFrameworkVersion` to the modern `TargetFramework` format, deciding whether to keep `OutputType` for clarity even though Library is the default, and removing `RootNamespace` and `AssemblyName` if they match the project name. I'll also consolidate the AssemblyInfo metadata directly into the project file properties to complete the modernization.

data.content:
Done. The project went from **47 lines → 11 lines**. Here's a summary of everything that changed:

**Removed (handled by SDK defaults):**
- `ToolsVersion`, `xmlns`, both `<Import>` elements
- `ProjectGuid`, `Configuration`/`Platform` conditionals, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects`
- Both Debug/Release `<PropertyGroup>` blocks (SDK provides equivalent defaults)
- All 6 `<Reference Include="System.*">` entries (implicit framework refs)
- All 3 `<Compile Include="...">` entries (SDK auto-globs `**/*.cs`)
- `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` (SDK auto-generates assembly attributes)
- `OutputType`, `RootNamespace`, `AssemblyName` (defaults match project name; Library is default)

**Preserved as `.csproj` properties:**
- Target framework (`net472`)
- Assembly metadata from `AssemblyInfo.cs` → `Description`, `Company`, `Copyright`, `Version`
